mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select ( case when degree = 1 then "初中" when degree = 2 then "高中" when degree = 3 then "大专" when degree = 4 then "本科" when degree = 5 then "硕士" when degree = 6 then "博士" end ) as name,count(*) value from student group by degree
select clazz.name as clazzName, count(*) as count from student right join clazz on student.clazz_id = clazz.id group by clazz.id, clazz.name
